caption: A woman with blonde-highlighted hair tied back and wearing black headphones is seated in a studio setting. She is dressed in a black t-shirt featuring a white graphic. In front of her is a professional microphone on a stand. Behind her, a dark wall is accented by a vertical yellow stripe, and a screen displays the word "Johnson" in red text. On-screen graphics include a logo that reads "PODCAST" under a microphone icon, and text that reads "BOSS TALK 101" accompanied by "By 11 Logo Studio." Across the sequence, the woman is speaking and gesturing with her right hand, which moves from being raised and open to resting lower as she continues to talk. The background remains static, while the woman's facial expressions and hand movements shift slightly as she engages in a conversation.
